session.title: PI-005 build closure — process v2 schema growth executed end-to-end via the SES-081 build prompt (process-v2.md spec, WT-054 ticket); migration 0018 lands six TEXT NULL columns and three new refs.relationship_kind values; UI grows the detail pane Phase-3-sections group and the Edit dialog; 22 new tests; PI-005 resolves
session.conversation_reference: Claude Code conversation at Doug's terminal, 2026-05-26 morning. Doug opened a long-running 'monitor PI-004; when Resolved, proceed with implementing PI-005' instruction; the monitor fired when SES-086 closed out PI-004 cohort and the build executed inline. SES-081's design phase had already produced the schema spec (process-v2.md v2.0) and the build prompt (CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-build-process-v2.md), so the build was straight execution against a fully-specified target — no surface-and-settle questions surfaced. WT-054 was the originating work ticket.
session.topics_covered: Pre-flight: clean git tree (after rebase), Alembic head 0017_v0_5_create_test_specs_table on CRMBUILDER engagement DB, persona/field/entity tables present (PI-003 and PI-004 cohort already landed), 1854-test baseline. Build (Steps 1-11): authored migration 0018_v0_8_process_v2_growth.py (revision/down_revision wires, six TEXT NULL columns added via batch_alter_table, refs.relationship_kind CHECK rebuilt with three new sorted-alphabetical kinds, downgrade with guarded DELETE of any refs rows holding new kinds); extended Process ORM model with six Mapped[str | None] columns + docstring note; extended vocab.REFERENCE_RELATIONSHIPS with three new kinds and _kinds_for_pair with three new clauses (all immediately active since persona/field/entity all live); extended process repository (_PATCHABLE_FIELDS frozenset + _new_process_row + _insert_with_autoassign + create_process + update_process + patch_process all accept the six new keyword args); extended ProcessCreateIn/ReplaceIn/PatchIn Pydantic schemas; updated router create/replace handlers to pass new fields through (PATCH dispatcher unchanged — auto-handles via process_ prefix strip); extended detail pane with a Phase-3-sections group (always-visible header + six CollapsibleSections, body collapsed when underlying column is NULL/empty); extended Edit dialog via new include_phase3 keyword on process_fields() (Create dialog left alone per spec §3.6.4). Tests: 22 new — repository-layer covers v0.4-record survival, per-field PATCH parametrized × 6, PATCH-to-None clears, PATCH-empty-string preserves, PUT-omit clears, vocab admission, refs CHECK admission, process_touches_entity round-trip, persona/field/requirement round-trips (skip-guarded against missing tables — all live so all ran). API-layer covers POST-with-phase3-fields round-trip, GET v0.4 record returns null phase3, PATCH null clears via REST, PATCH empty-string stored via REST, PUT-omit clears via REST. UI panel test updated for new field-order expectation. Run + verify (Steps 12-17): full v2 suite 1876 passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed (was 1854 → +22 PI-005 tests); migration applied to CRMBUILDER engagement DB (head now 0018); API process restarted (the pre-build process pre-dated PI-002 and was already restarted recently for that change); FIRST_PROC PROC-001 returns NULL for all six new fields; PATCH process_steps writes and PATCH null reverts; refs.relationship_kind CHECK confirmed admits all three new kinds via direct sqlite_master inspection.
session.summary: PI-005 (process schema growth beyond Phase 1 thin shape) shipped per the SES-081 design phase. Six new TEXT NULL Phase-3 content columns on processes (steps, triggers, outcomes, edge_cases, frequency, duration_estimate); three new references.relationship_kind values registered both in vocab and in the refs CHECK constraint (process_performed_by_persona, process_touches_field, process_touches_entity); detail pane grows with a Phase-3-sections collapsible group; Edit dialog accepts the new fields; Create dialog deliberately omits them per spec §3.6.4 (Phase 3 is post-create work). 22 new tests covering all 13 acceptance criteria in process-v2.md §3.7. Backward compatibility automatic: every v0.4-authored process record continues to validate as a legal v2 record with NULL for the six new columns. The CRMBUILDER engagement DB was migrated to head 0018 and the API restarted; PROC-001 was used as the live v0.4-record verification target. No new planning items surfaced; the spec §3.8.3 v0.7+ deferrals (structured process_steps, process variants, step-as-first-class-record, process_definition_level lifecycle, master-pane growth) remain CBM-redo-conditional per their original framing.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-005 — process v2 schema growth (six TEXT columns + three vocab kinds + UI)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-005 — process v2 schema growth (six TEXT columns + three vocab kinds + UI)

Grows the existing process methodology entity per
methodology-schema-specs/process-v2.md v2.0. Additive; preserves every
v0.4 field, the four-value process_classification lifecycle, the eight
endpoints, and the master pane verbatim.

Migration 0018:
- Adds six new TEXT NULL columns to processes: process_steps,
  process_triggers, process_outcomes, process_edge_cases,
  process_frequency, process_duration_estimate.
- Extends refs.relationship_kind CHECK to admit
  process_performed_by_persona, process_touches_field, and
  process_touches_entity.
- Reversible: downgrade drops the six columns and reverts the CHECK
  (with a guarded DELETE of any rows holding the new kinds — lossy
  recovery posture documented in the function docstring).

vocab.py, model, repo, schemas, router, UI, tests — full PI-005 surface
shipped per process-v2.md §3.2 / §3.3.2 / §3.5 / §3.6 / §3.7 and the
SES-081 build prompt. Baseline 1854 → 1876 passed (+22 new), 3 skipped
pre-existing. PI-005 resolves on close-out apply.
